PAGE_SUBTITLE: Explore how Saayam for All is making headlines and gaining recognition for its work in uplifting communities, empowering volunteers, and building an inclusive support network.
PAGE_DESCRIPTION: From local stories to national features, discover how our mission is resonating beyond the platform and into the world.
JOIN_DESCRIPTION: Chat with our community and get in touch with different charity organizations!

ramesh_maturu.title: Ramesh Maturu Named to the 2026 Georgia Titan 100 List
ramesh_maturu.description: Pyramid Consulting is pleased to announce that its President and Co-founder Ramesh Maturu, has been named a 2026 Georgia Titan 100, his second recognition following his initial selection in 2024.The Titan 100 program honors Georgia’s Top 100 CEOs and C-level executives who exemplify exceptional leadership, vision, and passion.

jensen_huang.title: With Jensen Huang, CEO of NVIDIA
jensen_huang.description: Rao with Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia in IIT Bay Area Conference.

vishal_sikka.title: With Vishal Sikka, Founder & CEO of Vianai Systems
vishal_sikka.description: An insightful exchange with Vishal Sikka on leadership, purpose-driven innovation, and building organizations that create long-term impact.

ramesh_ramana.title: With Ramesh Maturu and Ramana Yerneni on Carmel-by-the-Sea, CA beach
ramesh_ramana.description: A memorable moment at Carmel-by-the-Sea, California, reflecting on meaningful conversations and connections with Ramesh Maturu and Ramana Yerneni by the Pacific coast.

san_ramon_walk.title: In Step with the Community: A 17-Mile Walk in San Ramon
san_ramon_walk.description: Our CEO and Sateesh Mucharla participated in a 17-mile walk through San Ramon, California, championing wellness, unity, and public service.

srikar_reddy_koppula.title: With Dr. Srikar Reddy Koppula, Indian Consular in SF, CA
srikar_reddy_koppula.description: A moment with the Indian Consular team during a community engagement event.

amit_zavery.title: With Amit Zavery, President, CPO, and COO, ServiceNow; Board Member, Broadridge (NYSE:BR)
amit_zavery.description: Interaction during the IIT Bay Area Conference discussing leadership, innovation, and community impact.

madhusudhan_sai.title: With Madhusudhan Sai, global humanitarian and spiritual leader and President of Aria University, Anand Kuchibhotla
madhusudhan_sai.description: A meaningful meeting highlighting values of service, compassion, and purpose-driven initiatives.

murali_krishnamurthy.title: With Murali Krishnamurthy, CEO of Sankara Eye Foundation
murali_krishnamurthy.description: In conversation with Murali Krishnamurthy, CEO of Sankara Eye Foundation, on strengthening collaborations to improve healthcare accessibility and community impact.

jimmy_panetta_domingo_candelas.title: With U.S. Representative, Jimmy Panetta and San José City Council member, Domingo Candelas
jimmy_panetta_domingo_candelas.description: A productive discussion with U.S. Representative Jimmy Panetta and San José City Councilmember Domingo Candelas on social impact, healthcare accessibility, and collaborative efforts to uplift local communities.
